metadata.defaultDescription: In-person party games you can play with a single phone. No signup required.
metadata.aboutDescription: Learn about FunSpace — in-person party games for friends, playable on one shared phone.

home.heroTagline: Party games for friends, one phone
home.gamesSubheading: Pick a game and play together in the same room.

about.title: About FunSpace
about.description: FunSpace is a collection of in-person party games you can play with friends using a single shared phone. No accounts, no downloads — just open the site and play.

features.title: What we offer
features.catalog: A growing catalog of word-based and social games
features.singlePhone: Every game works on one shared device

impostor.name: Impostor
impostor.description: Find the impostor who doesn't know the secret word. Pass the phone to reveal roles privately.

hangman.name: Hangman
hangman.description: Guess the word letter by letter before the drawing is complete.

neverHaveIEver.name: Never Have I Ever
neverHaveIEver.description: Read prompts aloud and learn surprising things about your friends.
